title: EscalationRecord Schema
description: A CTL record representing an escalation event — when the orchestrator could not stabilize a session and passed control upward to the Meta Authority.

record_id.description: Unique identifier for this escalation record.

prev_record_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the previous record's canonical JSON.

timestamp_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the escalation was created.

session_id.description: UUID of the session being escalated.

student_id.description: Pseudonymous student identifier for the session being escalated.

escalating_actor_id.description: Pseudonymous identifier of the actor creating the escalation (usually the orchestrator).

target_meta_authority_id.description: Pseudonymous identifier of the Meta Authority who should receive this escalation.

trigger.description: Human-readable description of the condition that triggered escalation. No transcript content.

trigger_type.description: Structured trigger type for automated processing.

trigger_standing_order_id.description: ID of the standing order that was exhausted (if trigger_type is standing_order_exhausted).

trigger_invariant_id.description: ID of the invariant that was violated (if trigger_type is critical_invariant_violation).

domain_pack_id.description: Domain pack active at the time of escalation.

domain_pack_version.description: Version of the domain pack at the time of escalation.

evidence_summary.description: Structured evidence summary at the time of escalation. No transcript content.

decision_trail_hashes.description: Ordered list of SHA-256 hashes of CTL TraceEvent record IDs that led to this escalation.

proposed_action.description: The orchestrator's proposed next action for the Meta Authority to consider.

resolution_commitment_id.description: ID of the CommitmentRecord that resolved this escalation (set after resolution).

sla_deadline_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp by which the Meta Authority must acknowledge this escalation.

metadata.description: Additional structured metadata. Must not contain PII or transcript content.
